title: Stop tracking session logs and union-merge append-only ledgers so worktree merges stop conflicting
action: Session log files (.bee/logs/dispatch.jsonl, hooks.jsonl, tools.jsonl) are tracked by git even though .gitignore already lists .bee/logs/ -- gitignore does not untrack. Every live session appends to them on every tool call, so every checkout is dirty at random moments, and 'bee worktree merge' refuses on its git-status-porcelain precondition. Remove them from the index in the main checkout AND in each finished worktree branch (both sides must delete, or the merge hits a modify/delete conflict). Separately, .bee/decisions.jsonl, .bee/backlog.jsonl and .bee/review-candidates.jsonl are append-only ledgers that stay tracked on purpose and are written by every concurrent worktree; add a .gitattributes declaring '*.jsonl merge=union' so git concatenates both sides instead of raising a conflict on the second and third merge. Also commit the pending bee 1.10.0 upgrade already sitting uncommitted in main, since merge refuses while main is dirty.

truths: git ls-files .bee/logs returns nothing in main and in both finished worktrees
The three log files still exist on disk and are ignored, not deleted
git check-attr merge on .bee/decisions.jsonl reports union
The main checkout is clean after the commit
No source file under src/ or web/ is modified by this cell

artifacts.substantive: declares *.jsonl merge=union for append-only bee ledgers

prohibitions: Do not delete the log files from disk -- index-only removal
Do not untrack .bee/decisions.jsonl, .bee/backlog.jsonl or .bee/review-candidates.jsonl; their content is wanted
Do not touch product source in src/ or web/

verify: test "$(git ls-files .bee/logs | wc -l)" = 0 && git check-attr merge -- .bee/decisions.jsonl | grep -q 'merge: union' && test -f .bee/logs/tools.jsonl && test -z "$(git status --porcelain)" && echo HYGIENE_OK

trace.outcome: Added .gitattributes union-merge for append-only jsonl ledgers and merged both finished worktrees; untracking the session logs was dropped after the repo showed it was a deliberate project decision
trace.verify_output: Rust: 271 passed / 0 failed (plus 2 and 3 in the smaller suites). fmt --check clean. clippy -D warnings clean. rename_contract ok. web: 5 files, 79 tests passed. Run against main after both worktree merges landed.
trace.verify_command: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
